brands.title: ELITE BRANDS
brands.copy: We exclusively stock the most recognized and certified brands in the global sports nutrition industry.

workbanner.eyebrow: BUILD YOUR BODY. BUILD YOUR MIND. BUILD YOUR LIFE.™
workbanner.title: LET'S GET TO WORK.
workbanner.text: Our mission is to provide you with the tools and resources to build your body for whatever health and wellness goal you set your sights on. From programs and articles to supplements and gear, every part of your routine starts here.

items.title: BODY TYPES: HOW TO EXERCISE AND EAT FOR YOUR BODY
items.desc: Are you an ectomorph, mesomorph, or endomorph body type? Learn your body type so you can customize your exercise and nutrition for the results you want!

items.title: CALORIE BURN CALCULATOR FOR EXERCISE AND SPORTS
items.desc: Want to know how many calories you burned walking, running, or lifting weights? Dial in your calorie burn for over 100 activities!

items.title: FATS CALCULATOR: HOW MANY GRAMS OF FAT PER DAY?
items.desc: Fat is a necessary nutrient, but simply eating lots of high-fat foods isn't the best way to get what you need. Here's how many grams of healthy fats to eat...

items.title: BMR CALCULATOR: LEARN YOUR BASAL METABOLIC RATE
items.desc: Knowing how many calories your body burns each day is an important way to tailor your nutrition to your goals. Calculate your BMR to be more informed...

social.bio: Authentic supplements, training tips and motivation. Follow for daily updates and in-store exclusives.

newsletter.title: JOIN THE ELITE COMMUNITY
newsletter.desc: Subscribe to get special offers, free giveaways, and once-in-a-lifetime deals.

footer.brandDesc: The premier fitness and supplement source. Raw performance, authenticated quality, and expert guidance.

Pressing "Confirm" will open WhatsApp with your order pre-filled.
Send the message to complete your purchase.

product.notFoundDesc: The product you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
product.ingredientsText: Premium ingredients specially formulated for athletes: whey proteins, natural flavors, emulsifiers and sweeteners. No compromise on taste.
product.nutritionText: Per 30g: 24g protein, 3g carbs, 1.5g fat. Indicative values, adapted for training and recovery.
product.usageText: Mix one serving in 200–250ml of water or milk. Consume after training or at breakfast to optimize muscle recovery.

about.tagline: PUSH YOUR LIMITS. DOMINATE YOUR POTENTIAL.
about.story1Sub: FLEX SUPPS was born in 2019 from a radical vision: to equip Algerian athletes with the purest and most authentic sports nutrition in the world.
about.story2Sub: Every tub, every dose is rigorously selected, lab-tested, and sourced exclusively from official international manufacturers.
about.story3: THE ONLY STORE FOR REAL COMPETITORS.
about.story3Sub: Whether you seek raw strength, extreme recovery, or explosive energy, we provide the weapons you need to triumph.

contact.title: GET IN TOUCH
contact.desc: A question about our formulas? Need personalized advice or a partnership request? Contact our team of experts directly via this form or join us on our networks. Your satisfaction is our only priority.
contact.successMsg: Your message has been sent successfully!

whyUs.title: THE FLEX SUPPS DIFFERENCE

authentic.title: 100% AUTHENTIC
authentic.desc: Every product is sourced directly from official manufacturers. Zero counterfeits, absolute guarantee.

delivery.title: FAST DELIVERY

certified.title: CERTIFIED FORMULAS
certified.desc: All our brands are certified and lab-tested. Real performance, proven results.

support.title: EXPERT SUPPORT
support.desc: Our team of sports nutrition experts guides you in choosing the best supplements.

whyUs.highlight: FLEX SUPPS was founded with a raw passion for bodybuilding and self-improvement. Our mission is simple: offer Algerian athletes the absolute elite of sports nutrition.
whyUs.body: Our team rigorously selects every brand and every formula. We work directly with official international manufacturers to guarantee 100% authenticity, without any compromise. Whether you seek explosive strength, rapid recovery, or extreme endurance, we provide the tools necessary to dominate your potential.
whyUs.author: FLEX SUPPS ELITE TEAM
